rationale: The citing paper gives Jerath and Zhang (2010) a specific role in the related-literature argument, not just a list mention. It summarizes that paper's core finding about store-within-a-store channel structure under retailer-delegated manufacturer autonomy, then uses it to position the current paper's contribution as focusing on service channel design (who provides presales service vs after-sales support). This is a meaningful framing/positioning use, even though the citing paper does not directly reuse the cited paper's model.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Jerath and Zhang (2010) as a related prior channel-design study and positions its own contribution against it by shifting attention from store-within-a-store structure to endogenous allocation of presales and after-sales service provision in the channel.
